specific_mechanism: Hormesis: low-dose stress beneficial, high-dose harmful; U- or J-shaped dose-response curve; mechanism is adaptive overcompensation
llm_application: LLM adversarial robustness as hormesis: low-intensity adversarial training improves robustness; high-intensity degrades; biphasic dose-response curve in robust accuracy.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes toxicology topological-defect mapping as proposed.
